Off Calendar Sep-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Spalding for and with Sherry Mitchell.

Counsel explained the extent of services provided to support the Executor's extraordinary fees. The matters were taken under submission.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-03-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ronald Chun for Sherry S. Mitchell.

There being no opposition and notice having been properly given, the Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). The Court admitted the will dated January 3, 2005 and the Codicil dated September 6, 2006 and found that the September 6, 2006 Codicil was meant to change the January 3, 2005 will and that the November 2, 2004 will was properly revoked.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: J. Alameda/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Wong.
